nasb.text: Aaron married Elisheba, the daughter of Amminadab, the sister of Nahshon, and she bore him Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.

esv.text: Aaron took as his wife Elisheba, the daughter of Amminadab and the sister of Nahshon, and she bore him Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

cnv.text: 亞倫娶了亞米拿達的女兒拿順的妹妹以利沙巴作妻子；她給亞倫生了拿答、亞比戶、以利亞撒、以他瑪。

ccb.text: 亚伦与亚米拿达的女儿、拿顺的妹妹以利沙巴结婚，生了拿答、亚比户、以利亚撒和以他玛。
